statement: If evidence is absent or ambiguous, block rather than approve. The gate re-reads disk ground truth and certifies from signatures + real provenance, never a seat's self-report.
No mutable label keys an enforcement decision; every enforcement identity is a content-derived address. A mutable label must not stand where an identity belongs.

oracle.test: merkle-dag npm test; clotho test-registry.mjs (deriveNodeId content-binding)

statement: Nothing outside clotho/ may import from clotho/; each top-level package is self-contained. Slice diffs are confined to their declared paths.
Every package uses only the Node standard library (node: prefix); no npm packages, no lockfile.

oracle.test: docs/runs/clotho-impl-slice-4a/gate.mjs (zero-deps check); each package npm run check

statement: The Eye's approval of consequential, irreversible, self-improving, or authority-expanding action cannot be delegated to a model or inferred from silence. A model approval is not human authority; convergence is not authorization.

oracle.cited: docs/runs/clotho-authorization-7/ (NOT_AUTHORIZED preserved) — required-seat dissent blocked a contradictory plan
